title: Internal and external sources of finance
summary: 9609 AS — retained profit, sale of assets, loans, shares, and venture capital.

simpleExplanation.title: Inside or outside the business
simpleExplanation.summary: Internal funds come from profits or selling assets. External funds come from owners, lenders, or investors.
steps: Internal: retained profit, sale of assets.
External: share issue, bank loan, overdraft.
Leasing and trade credit are external.

sections.content: **Sources of finance** (5.2.2) is heavily examined. Build a **two-column internal/external table** for revision.

sections.label: Mark a sources of finance question
